feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MyInbox tasks count error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
I have an issue on MyInbox count tasks on Launchpad tile.

With browser console I see that this call service get an 500 error:

<host>/dynamic_dest/workflowService/TaskCollection/$count/?$filter=Status eq 'READY' or Status eq 'RESERVED' or Status eq 'IN_PROGRESS' or Status eq 'EXECUTED'&sap-language=IT
 
What I can do to solve?
 
MyInbox App is a copy of standard as described here.
 
Best Regards,
Giampaolo

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: IPS Sync Issue : S/4HANA Cloud Private edition User and Roles Sync
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to sync the users and their roles from SAP S/4Hana Cloud, Private Edition to Work Zone (standard) using IPS sync. 

We've followed the below process by referring the help documents. 

  • Configure the Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Application Server ABAP | SAP Help Portal
  • Configure Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal

However, while performing the sync we're getting issue "Initialization of repository destination <destination_name> Failed: No user identity is configured". 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition version : 2022 

Steps Followed: 

1. Established the cloud connector setup with BTP Subaccount 

2. Subscribed the SAP Identity service, connectivity plan to BTP subaccount based on IAS region

3. Created a dedicated destination with "RFC" as connection type with cloud connector information and checked the connection 

4. Created Source system with type "SAP Application Server ABAP" and selected the destination (point3).

5. Created target system with type "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" 

6. Performed the Read / Resync action from the Source system. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: [BTP Build Work Zone] Facing error in console after deploying Fiori application
entry.content:
I am getting the following console error after deploying my application to the SAP BTP Build Work Zone Standard Edition. I am using a trial account.

I am not sure what I have to do, I have tried changing the manifest dependency libraries' lazy to true, but that gives me "unsafe eval" errors so i'm confused as to what the problem is here.

 

2024-07-20 20:28:08.229899 The issue is most likely caused by application usertest. Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application. - Failed to load UI5 component with properties: '{
    "name": "usertest",
    "url": "/971e38f5-943b-40df-acee-b48fc9e25326.roles-test.usertest/~200724145334+0000~/",
    "manifest": true,
    "asyncHints": {
        "libs": [
            {
                "name": "sap.fe.core",
                "lazy": false
            },
            {
                "name": "sap.fe.templates",
                "lazy": false
            },
            {
                "name": "sap.m",
                "lazy": false
            },
            {
                "name": "sap.ui.fl",
                "lazy": false
            }
        ],
        "components": [],
        "waitFor": []
    },
    "messages": [],
    "version": "0.0.1",
    "id": "application-UserTest-display-component",
    "componentData": {
        "startupParameters": {}
    }
}'. Error likely caused by:
Error: Could not load metadata: 404 error
    at Object.createError (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:2316:3817)
    at Object.<anonymous> (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:2328:873)
    at Object.<anonymous> (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-1.js:556:9596)
    at u (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-1.js:602:25639)
    at Object.fireWith [as rejectWith] (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-1.js:602:26474)
    at k (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-1.js:602:84147)
    at XMLHttpRequest.<anonymous> (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.126.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-1.js:602:86804) usertest

Edit: i've inserted the photo of the error itself, basically the same thing as above

entry.title: Issues with Contact numbers appearing as link
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In BPA mail body, contact numbers are displayed as link and I have attempted various method to ensure that it does not appear as link, all to no avail. I have also used decision logic to pass fixed numbers and type the + directly to the mail body, still it came as link. The only way around was to remove the plus sign + which is a requirement for the contact numbers and would not serve as a solution for us.

Does anyone know a way to resolve this issue? Looking forward to your contributions. Thank you

entry.title: Delete error of local copy of app in Work Zone standard
entry.content:
Hello,

we face with an error in SAP Wonk Zone standard when we want to delete a local copy of an app:

"Something went wrong and the content item could not be deleted. Please retry deleting your changes, or close and try again later."

Is there any delete circumstance that is block deleting or is this a service error of the instance which muste be adressed to SAP support?

BR

Reiner

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud : How to create Fiori tiles for BTP -BPA form triggers for automations
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have built form trigger for a process automation that we have built on BTP -Build process automation, we are able to test the form trigger with the generated Url link for the form.

But how can we create a Fiori tile on S4 HANA public cloud Fiori launch pad for this BPA form  where the business users can have access to these tile and trigger the automations.

We have tried to create tile using Custom Catalog but question here is that we can give a static Url in the custom catalog app, but when the BTP sub account is different is for Dev and Prod environments then BPA form link will also be changing. in this case how can we create a Fiori tile which will dynamically points to the correct BPA form in all the environments ( Dev and prod).

SAP Build Process Automation  SAP Build SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori

entry.title: Override back button on FLP
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to override the back button behavior on Sap Build Workzone. My application is Fiori Elements with Fiori Freestyle with odata v4. I want to raise an exception when a user is in the Object Page in edit mode and clicks on the back button. I tried the suggestions here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/flp-nav-back-button-issue/qaq-p/12142325/comment-id/4538564#M4538564. But didn't work for me. I tried using this part:

this.getOwnerComponent().getService("ShellUIService").then(function(oShellService) {
    oShellService.setBackNavigation(function() {
        //either do nothing to disable it, or add your own nav back logic for having the navigation
    });
});

In the onAterRendering method of the Object Page controller, but it doesn't enter the setBackNavigation function. Can someone help with this issue.

 

Thanks,

Violina

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

Following above tutorials I created many mdk apps with systems SampleServiceV4 & swagger_petstore

I googled a lot but surprisingly I did not see any blog explaining creating tile selecting 'system' for sap mobile start

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

providing additional details below:

bas project folder with apps developed using mdk:

destination:

mobile services native/mdk:

project.json of app

launchpad is sap mobile start enabled.

app configuration (content manager / demo), system available for selection:

 

what should be correct selection for 'app ui technology' ?

if i select sap ui5, it asks for component id. what should i provide in component id?

if i select 'dynamic url' , what should be the url?

 

Please help in this regard.

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Restrict few SAP Fiori Notification to SAP Workzone and Mobile Devices
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have configured multiple notifications in the SAP S/4 system. This included configuring the standard notification as well as custom notification.

I have also integrated the SAP Workzone notification with the SAP Fiori Launchpad notification and configured the SAP Mobile Start to get the notification on mobile devices.

My question is how we can restrict some notifications to Fiori launchpad only and not pass that notification to SAP Workzone or mobile devices. 

Is there any way which is provided by the SAP Notification framework by which we can do this so that my sensitive notification can only be on Fiori launchpad and not move to Workzone or mobile devices?

entry.title: Modification of standard SAP Notification
entry.content:
I have activated some of the standard notifications for workflow and purchase orders.

But I have a requirement that the notification text should be changed, and we have to disable some action buttons and have to introduce a new action button. Is there any way in the extended framework for notification by which we can enhance the standard notification?

If we have to restrict certain notifications to only get triggered for some type of business document or some purchase organization, how can we achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition subscriptions fails in US based BTP trial account.
entry.content:
I have been trying to subscribe to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition in BTP trial account. The account is US based. I have tried several times to create/delete as instructed but nothing seem to be working. 

can you please advice / check?

thank you

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Subscription Failed
entry.content:
HI  Experts, I am using my Trial Account in SAP BTP, When I'm trying to create a instance/subscription for SAP Build Workzone , I'm getting error as such

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Getting error as such 'Service broker error: Service broker portal responded with invalid JSON: 404 Not Found: Requested route ('portal-service.cert.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com') does not exist.' I have installed the Cloud Identity Services also, but still facing this issue.Kindly Help

entry.title: Deploy React app as HTML5 in Build work zone - with Custom domain
entry.content:
I have a React app deployed in HTML5 repository and provisioned as a URL app in Build work zone , standard edition. After assigning a custom domain, all the normal UI5 apps work as expected, but the react app is not opening. As this is running in an iframe, its redirecting to the cloud identity services - that's URL is blocked in the iframe. 

anyone already tried these ?

entry.title: CSRF token error(403 Post ) fails when making calls from the SAP Build Apps to ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have developed an application using SAP Build that connects to an ABAP on Cloud system. In SAP Build Apps, the POST call used to create records works correctly. However, after deploying the application to SAP Workzone, the POST call fails with a "503 CSRF token validation failed" error.

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

Is there any config needed in the SAP Build WorkZone? 

Below is the destination details

 

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition - Content Package Role
entry.content:
Hi,

Referring to this guide "A Guide to Developing and Deploying Content Packag... - SAP Community" by @jens_kristen : 

 I have issues with the roles in the Content Package and couldn't manage to get that solved.

When creating the Content Package, an error appears "Error: No src config for sample-role", but it continues with building the package. Also I get an error in Workzone. Could you please advise what could be the issue here? Many thanks! Max 

My role.json looks like this:

Content.json

entry.title: Custom Shell plugin in Mobile start not visible
entry.content:
I have developed a simple shell plugin to open an app using semantic/action. Its is visible in WZ standard edition Desktop browser and works as expected, but not in mobile device. is it limitation or do I miss any configuration ?

 
Component.js
 
 oRenderer.addHeaderEndItem({
                        icon: "sap-icon://manager",
                        tooltip: "My Substitutes",
                        target: "#ZMANAGE-create"
                    }, true, false);
Manifest
  "hideLauncher": true,
  "semanticObject": "Shell",
  "action": "plugin"
....
"sap.flp": {
    "type": "plugin"
  },
.....
 "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
 
Desktop:

 Mobile Device (Mobile Start app)

Any pointers would help

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Sending notification to SAP build workzone from CAP app
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As the title suggests, I am trying to send notification from Cap app to build workzone. I have followed the following tutorial:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sending-notifications-from-sap-btp-applications-to-the-sap-fiori-launchpad/ba-p/13517316

The code seems to work fine but it's giving the following error:

 Also when I check the connection of my destination in btp, it returns 401 unauthorized.

entry.title: Configuring or Disabling Authentication in SAP Build Apps Deployed on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP Build Apps, which I have deployed on SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform). Whenever I access the application in SAP C4C, a login window pops up requesting a username and password.


Is it possible to completely disable authentication for my SAP Build Apps application deployed on SAP BTP?
I would prefer to have unrestricted access to the app without the need for user credentials, if that's feasible.

If complete disabling is not possible, can authentication be managed through Mashup parameters or some configuration settings?
Ideally, I would like to preset the username and possibly bypass the login screen through backend configurations or scripts.

Are there any recommended practices for managing authentication in SAP Build Apps within the SAP BTP environment?
If disabling authentication isn't an option, I am open to other suggestions that can simplify the login process for end-users.

Any guidance, examples, or documentation references would be greatly appreciated. I am relatively new to working with SAP Build Apps, so detailed steps or explanations would be very helpful!

entry.title: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content:
I am connecting SAP Build Process Automation My Inbox, and Task Center, in the same subaccount.

I have done the steps from: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/using-same-subaccount

I have configured Task Center with a booster and configured the destinations properly, and it is working, the tasks are being retrieved, but I am not being assigned as an approver to the task.

I already configured Cloud Identity Services, and e-mail as Subject Name Attribute.

I tried to refresh tasks, by removing and adding the property "tc.enabled" from "SAPBuildPA" Destination, and it did not work too.

entry.title: Default Values in Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi everybody,
one of our customers wants to use Default Values in Build Work Zone, standard edition according to the documentation here. However the request for saving the default values in the settings dialog

https://sandbox.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/UI2/INTEROP/PersContainers

results in an 404 Not Found, which is obvious, because the request is not routed to the S4 backend. Does anyone have an idea how to route this request, that is outside any of our apps, correctly? An idea that came in our mind is a Launchpad plugin, but we think there must be an easier solution. 

Does anyone have experience with Default Values in Build Work Zone and already solved this issue?

Any kind of help is appreciated. 

Best regards,

Marcel
